{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Riverseeds
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Riverseeds]] are pure spirits born in areas with a strong balance between water and [[life]] [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
